prompt: Draft and open a PRD issue for improving onboarding: when a new workspace is created, guide the user through inviting teammates, connecting integrations, and completing the first useful setup action.
assertions: The workflow distinguishes product-scope questions from questions answerable by exploration or official documentation.
The workflow walks dependent decisions in order, resolving parent decisions before child decisions and surfacing assumptions before the PRD is written.
The PRD avoids specific file paths, code snippets, and brittle command or project-structure dumps while still citing existing product or architectural patterns.
The Out of Scope section clearly excludes deferred onboarding paths, integrations, or implementation work.
The final output includes the GitHub issue title/body, intended gh issue create command, and any important accepted assumptions or follow-up notes.
